message:
feat: extend session authentication to product-scoped search, inbox, and thread summary tools

Continues the authentication rollout from the previous commit by
retrofitting product-bus tools with the same session-aware auth
pattern, and adding per-agent message visibility filtering to
cross-project queries.

- Add sqlalchemy and_() import and wrapper for composing visibility
  clauses across multiple projects
- Retrofit search_messages_product with _authenticate_product_agents:
  resolves authorized project+agent pairs, restricts FTS queries to
  only authorized project IDs, and includes m.sender_id in result set
  for visibility enforcement
- Add agent_name and registration_token parameters to
  search_messages_product, fetch_inbox_product, and
  summarize_thread_product tools
- Retrofit fetch_inbox_product to iterate authorized (project, agent)
  pairs instead of looking up agents separately, eliminating silent
  skips on auth failures
- Retrofit summarize_thread_product with per-project visibility clauses
  using and_(project_id match, message_visible_to_agent) composed with
  or_() so each project's agent sees only their own messages
- Add registration_token parameter stubs to disabled product bus tools
  for interface consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@

 from git import Repo
 from git.exc import InvalidGitRepositoryError, NoSuchPathError
-from sqlalchemy import asc as _sa_asc, bindparam, delete as _sa_delete, desc as _sa_desc, exists as _sa_exists, func, or_ as _sa_or, select as _sa_select, text, update as _sa_update
+from sqlalchemy import and_ as _sa_and, asc as _sa_asc, bindparam, delete as _sa_delete, desc as _sa_desc, exists as _sa_exists, func, or_ as _sa_or, select as _sa_select, text, update as _sa_update
 from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError, NoResultFound, OperationalError, TimeoutError as SATimeoutError
 from sqlalchemy.orm import aliased
 
@@ -128,6 +128,10 @@ def or_(*clauses: Any) -> Any:
     return _sa_or(*clauses)
 
 
+def and_(*clauses: Any) -> Any:
+    return _sa_and(*clauses)
+
+
 def exists(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any:
     return _sa_exists(*args, **kwargs)

@@ -10425,7 +10459,7 @@ async def search_messages_product(
